'''chathatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docent|docent]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docent|docent]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chathatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæthæthæth|chæthæthæth]] || [[word:chæthæthæj|chæthæthæj]] || [[word:chæthæthæsh|chæthæthæsh]] || [[word:chæthæthæ|chæthæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathathathath|chathathathath]] || [[word:chathathathaj|chathathathaj]] || [[word:chathathathash|chathathathash]] || [[word:chathathatha|chathathatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathathath|chathathath]] || [[word:chathathaj|chathathaj]] || [[word:chathathash|chathathash]] || [[word:chathatha|chathatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathafthath|chathafthath]] || [[word:chathafthaj|chathafthaj]] || [[word:chathafthash|chathafthash]] || [[word:chathafthaf|chathafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathathatha|chathathatha]] || [[word:chathathaja|chathathaja]] || [[word:chathathasha|chathathasha]] || [[word:chathathaka|chathathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathathath|chathathath]] || [[word:chathathaj|chathathaj]] || [[word:chathathash|chathathash]] || [[word:chathatha|chathatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathathathal|chathathathal]] || [[word:chathathajal|chathathajal]] || [[word:chathathashal|chathathashal]] || [[word:chathathakal|chathathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathathathatha|chathathathatha]] || [[word:chathathajaja|chathathajaja]] || [[word:chathathashasha|chathathashasha]] || [[word:chathathaka|chathathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathathathan|chathathathan]] || [[word:chathathajan|chathathajan]] || [[word:chathathashan|chathathashan]] || [[word:chathathakan|chathathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathathathaoro|chathathathaoro]] || [[word:chathathajaoro|chathathajaoro]] || [[word:chathathashaoro|chathathashaoro]] || [[word:chathathakaoro|chathathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
